allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/app.js'\).then\(\(\)=>{console.log\('OK: app.js and all notification modules import cleanly'\);process.exit\(0\)}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('IMPORT ERROR:',e\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(\(\)=>import\('./src/config/auth.js'\)\).then\(m=>{const api=m.auth?.api||{}; console.log\('✓ auth instance created'\); console.log\('  has handler:', typeof m.auth.handler\); console.log\('  api endpoints:', Object.keys\(api\).length\); console.log\('  signInEmail:', typeof api.signInEmail, '| getSession:', typeof api.getSession, '| forgetPassword:', typeof api.forgetPassword\);}\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('ERR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\)}\)")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('dotenv/config'\).then\(\(\)=>import\('./src/app.js'\)\).then\(\(\)=>console.log\('✓ app loads with Better Auth'\)\).catch\(e=>{console.error\('LOAD ERR:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\)}\)")
